description: A second clean stone slab for tonal variety in the floor field — Kenney Roguelike Dungeon plain-floor cell (tilemaps/kenney-dungeon.png, 16px on 17px stride; col 10, row 2), distinct from the base cell (col 9). The Kenney dungeon sheet authors only grey stone (no green moss floor), so this variant gives slab-to-slab variation rather than a wrong-tint moss; mossy reads come from props placed on the floor, not the tile.
